title: Junior SEO Specialist at Treebo Hotels

jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Treebo Hotels
jsonLd.description:
Treebo Hotels invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Visakhapatnam location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Treebo Hotels:
Treebo Hotels is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Treebo Hotels!
